title: Wuffy's Weather2 Additions
description: Currently this mod re-adds the radar block which allows you to see all of the local storm within 1024 blocks of its position!
body:
# Weather 2 Additions

An Addon mod for the Weather2 mod!
[Check it out here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weather-storms-tornadoes)

Currently this mod re-adds the radar block which allows you to see all of the local storm within 1024 blocks of its position!

![The radar in action, displaying a tornado and a few otherstorms nearby!](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/332780688585654273/1291868456458915951/image.png?ex=6701a9c1&is=67005841&hm=6957963a77d2533e72ef0e39a54e576c23a64bb888c103449afa3fc102aeac21&)

This mod also has JourneyMap integration, of which is currently WIP. It adds the ability to see all the storms on your map! This is subject to change in the future!

![Storms showing up on JourneyMap](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1153357489673355274/1293005502351016006/image.png?ex=6705ccb6&is=67047b36&hm=2bec9273ab7f6e1ab37024af43ff2f21a7a37dab9b410203e7a17ee67cd86cab&)


More features to be added in the future!
